steps.name: Test Case: 6HjnL2
steps.statusMessage:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

- Undocumented HTTP status code

    Received: 401
    Documented: 200, 400, 404, 500

[401] Unauthorized:

    `{ "statusCode": 401, "message": "Access denied due to invalid subscription key. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription." }`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X GET -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' 'https://api.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-org/service/v1/organizations/15376371009/fdrs?flowDate=2026-07-01T12%3A00%3A30.900000Z&page=1&pspId=88888888888&publishedGt=2025-01-01T12%3A00%3A00Z&size=50&subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
